title: Welcome to MD Pro
content:
# Welcome to MD Pro

Your markdown note-taking app is ready to use!

## Getting Started

- **Create notes** with the '+' button
- **Edit** by clicking on any note in the sidebar
- **Delete** notes with the delete icon
- **Format** your text using markdown syntax

## Features

Full markdown support
Real-time preview
Auto-save to cloud
Persistent storage

Start creating your first note now!

title: Markdown Syntax Guide
content:
# Markdown Basics

## Text Formatting

**Bold text** with `**text**`
*Italic text* with `*text*`
~~Strikethrough~~ with `~~text~~`

## Headings

# H1 Heading
## H2 Heading
### H3 Heading

## Lists

### Unordered
- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item

### Ordered
1. First
2. Second
3. Third

## Code

Inline `code` with backticks

```
Code block
Multiple lines
```

## Blockquotes

> This is a quote
>
> — Someone wise
